trait.name: Inner Furnace
trait.effect:
Once a round, at the start of your turn, you may stoke your soul aether, performing one of the following:
• Heat reckless. Your next damaging ability increases its area sizes by +1 and its base attack and area damage by +2.
• Cool 6, then end all negative statuses affecting you.

basicAttack.name: Magi
basicAttack.effect:
Attack: 2 damage. Hit: +1d6
Area effect: 2 damage
Effect a difficult (5+) dangerous terrain space in the center space, even if it's occupied.

limitBreak.name: Gigaflare
limitBreak.effect:
I, who stand at the apex of things,
Condemn thee to the deepest pits of despair.
Let thy very bones become ash!
O Flame, let the air become death!
Ignite, and be banished to Hell! Gigaflare!
Area Effect summon the Eldflame, the primeval force of creation, dealing piercing damage equal to 1d6 + the round number to every character, on the battlefield, ignoring line of sight and cover. Characters in range 1-2 of you are exempt from this ability.
Effect limit break upgrades.
• If you're bloodied, it becomes Megaloflare, and deals damage twice.
• If you're in crisis, it becomes Megiddoflare, dealing damage three times instead.

keywords.name: Reckless
keywords.description: Push yourself to the limit gaining extra effects but inflicting yourself with the Reckless (-) unique status. You take +1 damage from all sources per stack of reckless. You can only clear reckless by effects that clear a negative status.
